name: Too Simple Cream of Chicken Noodle Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 large chicken breasts (bone in, skin on)
2 large chicken thighs (bone in, skin on)
5 medium potatoes (thin skinned or peeled), cubed
1 lb macaroni (or equivalent amount of pasta)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, boil the chicken until it is tender and ready to fall off the bones. Remove from the broth and set aside.
2. Add the macaroni (or pasta) and all of the vegetables to the broth. Cook until the vegetables are tender.
3. Remove the skin and bone the chicken. Slice or dice the meat into 1/4-inch pieces as desired, then add to the broth.
4. Gradually add the bouillon to taste the desired flavor. Mix well and sample as needed.
5. In a small bowl, melt the butter. Whisk in the flour to form a paste. Slowly whisk in the milk until smooth and creamy. Add this mixture to the soup, stirring until well blended.
6. Add the Bell's Seasoning and remaining spices. Simmer for 20 minutes. Cool to desired temperature and serve.
